mapper.select: SELECT e.evaluation_id, e.project_id, p.project_name, e.lot_id, l.lot_code, l.lot_name, e.opening_id, e.status, e.evaluation_mode, e.start_time, e.finalize_time, e.final_summary, e.rollback_reason, e.version, e.create_time, e.update_time FROM t_bid_evaluation e INNER JOIN t_bid_project p ON p.project_id = e.project_id INNER JOIN t_bid_lot l ON l.lot_id = e.lot_id WHERE e.evaluation_id = #{evaluationId} AND e.deleted_flag = 0 AND p.deleted_flag = 0 AND l.deleted_flag = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT e.evaluation_id, e.project_id, p.project_name, e.lot_id, l.lot_code, l.lot_name, e.opening_id, e.status, e.evaluation_mode, e.start_time, e.finalize_time, e.final_summary, e.rollback_reason, e.version, e.create_time, e.update_time FROM t_bid_evaluation e INNER JOIN t_bid_project p ON p.project_id = e.project_id INNER JOIN t_bid_lot l ON l.lot_id = e.lot_id WHERE e.lot_id = #{lotId} AND e.deleted_flag = 0 AND p.deleted_flag = 0 AND l.deleted_flag = 0 ORDER BY e.evaluation_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT evaluation_item_id, evaluation_id, opening_item_id, submission_id, supplier_name_snapshot, quoted_price, total_score, ranking_no, recommend_flag, evaluation_comment, create_time FROM t_bid_evaluation_item WHERE evaluation_id = #{evaluationId} AND deleted_flag = 0 ORDER BY ranking_no ASC, evaluation_item_id ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_bid_evaluation_item WHERE evaluation_id = #{evaluationId} AND deleted_flag = 0
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_bid_evaluation
status = #{status}, evaluation_mode = #{evaluationMode}, start_time = #{startTime}, finalize_time = #{finalizeTime}, final_summary = #{finalSummary}, rollback_reason = #{rollbackReason}, update_user_id = #{updateUserId}, version = version + 1
WHERE evaluation_id = #{evaluationId} AND version = #{version} AND deleted_flag = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_bid_evaluation_item ( evaluation_id, opening_item_id, submission_id, supplier_name_snapshot, quoted_price, total_score, ranking_no, recommend_flag, deleted_flag ) SELECT #{evaluationId}, oi.opening_item_id, oi.submission_id, oi.supplier_name_snapshot, oi.quoted_price, NULL, NULL, 0, 0 FROM t_bid_opening_item oi WHERE oi.opening_id = #{openingId} AND oi.deleted_flag = 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_bid_evaluation_item ei WHERE ei.evaluation_id = #{evaluationId} AND ei.opening_item_id = oi.opening_item_id AND ei.deleted_flag = 0 ) ORDER BY oi.sort_no ASC, oi.opening_item_id ASC
